You know how to get her Pursuit to trigger, yes?
I think i do. You have to build up weaver right? And then use in it ultra state if you can
Yes, use that card to gain weaver
Then you either wait for the ultra round, or take a card out of ultra space
After doing that, use her ult and any card played by a different awaker triggers her follow up
Okay so you have to use her ult so everyone can trigger pursuit
Outside of ultra round, pursuit can be triggered by using Annihilate instead before ult
On the turn you take out a card or ultra round
Otherwise her ult is just damage amp and shield
Yeah that, no wonder it has a 3-turn cooldown
So don't Ult first and then take out the card
Annihilate > Exalt > Certain death (for the opposing side)

Sounds good even though none of the characters interested me and hearing it is made by Hotta Studio doesn't really inspire confidence lol

Limited banner
The limited banner for NTE is quite similar to other gacha games. You can perform either a 10 pull or a 1x. An A-rank agent is guaranteed every 10x pull, while you can get the S-Rank at 90th.
Soft pity for the game starts after 70 pulls
There is no 50 50 system, guaranteeing the S-Rank you receive to be the rate-up one.
Pity carries over to the next banner. For example, the first banner will be of Nanally, followed by Hotori. If you pulled a total of 30 times on Nanally's banner,
The drop rate for an S-Rank is around 0.99 percent, and A-Ranks have an 11 percent chance.
You can pull here using either the Annulith you obtain, or the Solid Dice (red ones).
There will also be cosmetics for the rate-up character in Neverness to Everness; you will receive them if the dice lands on the respective tile or by completing a certain number of pulls.


Standard Banner
The Standard Banner is only for characters, as there are no Arcs in it.
You can select an S-Rank agent after completing 50 pulls for the first time. These will be discounted, leading you to only spending 40 Fabricated Dice (Blue ones).
Character drop rate remains the same, with a 0.99 S-Rank drop and an 11 percent chance of an A-Rank to drop.
Fabricated Dice will be the currency needed to pull on this banner (The blue dice)

Weapons Banner (Arc)
You cannot perform single pulls in this banner; instead, you will always have to perform a 10x.
You will need Tri-Keys to pull on this banner
The hard pity is at 80, with the soft one starting at 60 pulls.
You can receive either the rate-up Arc or any of the standard ones.
You are guaranteed to get the rate-up arc at 80, and in case you get a standard one before that, it won't reset your pity.

When talking about why they think something is doing well, people tend to focus on sales and download numbers but contrary to what one might believe, these numbers on their own can be flawed if used in isolation.

This is especially the case with gacha games like Fate Grand Order, Genshin, Nikke or
